title: Calling Bell
description: Upon pickup, obtain a unique [red]Curse[/red] and [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Relics[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Adds CurseOfTheBell to your deck and offers 3 random relics (one Common, one Uncommon, one Rare) as a reward upon pickup.
